data.title: Kandi Burruss' "Speak On It" returns for Season 7 with revealing content. ATLANTA, Aug. 7, 2025.
data.description: Kandi Burruss is making a bold return with the seventh season of Speak On It in Atlanta. The latest season, which premiered on August 7, 2025, is promised to be the most revealing yet, with Kandi not shying away from any topics. The guests this season are prepared to divulge all, setting the stage for intriguing conversations. Don't miss out on the explosive start to this highly-anticipated season!

data.title: Almora Botanica receives two groundbreaking patents for Ayurvedic skincare, marking a major advancement in beauty industry.
data.description: In a significant development on August 7, 2025, in London, Almora Botanica, a trailblazing Ayurvedic skincare brand focusing on scientific advancements, has obtained two innovative patents. These patents symbolize a substantial advancement not just for the company alone, but for the Ayurvedic beauty sector on the whole.

data.title: Persistent Systems makes leadership changes to boost growth, aiming to enhance operations; a BSE company listed under the code 533179 (NSE: PERSISTENT).
data.description: On August 7, 2025, in Santa Clara, California, and Pune, India, Persistent Systems (BSE: 533179) (NSE: PERSISTENT), a prominent player in Digital Engineering and Enterprise Modernization globally, unveiled strategic leadership alterations aimed at boosting its growth trajectory and improving operational efficiency.

data.title: Cole Haan launches Fall 2025 global campaign "Cole Haan Comfortable™", redefining comfort for modern lifestyle.
data.description: Cole Haan, the renowned American brand, is shaking up fall fashion with cutting-edge designs tailored for everyday life. On August 7, 2025, Cole Haan introduced its global campaign for Fall 2025, known as Cole Haan Comfortable™. This initiative is set to revolutionize the perception of comfort in contemporary times. The campaign aims to showcase comfort in a new light, catering to life's most relatable moments. With this innovative approach, Cole Haan is set to make waves in the fashion industry.

data.title: KYOCERA AVX introduces new Hermaphroditic WTW & WTB Connectors with the 9288-000 Series for easy, tool-free termination.
data.description: Introducing the latest 9288-000 Series connectors, allowing for swift and hassle-free termination in the field, ensuring robust and dependable high-integrity connections. These connectors are designed to offer outstanding electrical and mechanical performance, specifically tailored for lighting and industrial applications. This innovative product was revealed in Fountain Inn, S.C. on August 7, 2025.

data.title: Westinghouse signs first Purchase Order with Bulgarian supplier for AP1000® project at Kozloduy Nuclear Power Plant, emphasizing commitment to local suppliers.
data.description: In Sofia, Bulgaria, Westinghouse Electric Company has finalized its initial Purchase Order with MTG-Dolphin AD, in support of the dual-unit AP1000® initiative at the Kozloduy Nuclear Power Plant. This marks Westinghouse's dedication to engaging local suppliers for enhancing nuclear power production at Kozloduy. The purchase involves creating the Nuclear Quality Assurance (NQA-1) Program, incorporating a nuclear safety ethos, and laying the groundwork for the project's success. This collaboration underscores the importance of involving local resources in Bulgaria's nuclear power expansion efforts.

data.title: Atwell acquires majority stake in Centurion Power, adding electrical acceptance testing services in Washougal, WA. Transaction terms undisclosed.
data.description: Atwell, headquartered in Southfield, Michigan, has recently acquired a majority share in Centurion Power, located in Washougal, Washington. Centurion Power offers electrical acceptance testing, inspection, certification, and commissioning services to the electrical power sector. The exact financial details of the deal were not revealed. Centurion Power focuses on electrical acceptance testing, commissioning, and maintenance testing. This move reflects Atwell's growth strategy and expansion in the industry.

data.title: Colibri Real Estate launches nationwide CE Membership Program for real estate professionals, offering flexibility and savings.
data.description: Colibri Real Estate (CRE) has unveiled its new CRE Membership program, a groundbreaking subscription-based continuing education (CE) offering for real estate professionals. This innovative solution allows professionals to tailor their CE completion according to their preferences, providing flexibility and saving on time, costs, and hassle. With the program now accessible across the US, individuals can easily manage their compliance requirements while receiving support tailored to the specific demands of the real estate sector.

data.title: Women In Bio partnered with Latham & Watkins to launch a new Boardroom Ready cohort, providing opportunities for women in biotech.
data.description: In Dallas on August 7, 2025, Women In Bio (WIB) announced the commencement of the latest group for the Boardroom Ready program, with sponsor Latham & Watkins. This initiative facilitates networking and collaboration opportunities for women in the biotech and life sciences sectors. This program aims to support women in accessing valuable resources for professional growth, promoting diversity and inclusion in these industries.

data.title: Messi's Más+ beverage introduces new "Greatest Grape" flavor at Walmart stores nationwide, boosting its everyday hydration portfolio.
data.description: Soccer legend Leo Messi, along with his business partners, has introduced a new grape-flavored hydration beverage under the brand Más+ by Messi®. This latest addition to their product line is now available for purchase at Walmart stores across the United States. The beverage aims to provide functional hydration and cater to consumer preferences for sweet and tangy flavors. The decision to launch the new flavor comes as part of the brand's expansion strategy. The product is currently gaining traction and the company is optimistic about its performance in the market.

data.title: Kenco celebrates 75 years as a trusted supply chain partner, based in Chattanooga, TN.
data.description: A supply chain partner based in Chattanooga, Tennessee, Kenco recently marked its 75th year as a trusted and preferred choice for customers.

data.title: Dash partners with Peanuts for a kitchen collection to celebrate Snoopy's 75th birthday, aiming to make cooking memorable.
data.description: The top waffle maker in the United States is collaborating with the iconic comic strip Peanuts to honor its 75th anniversary. Dash introduces a unique kitchen collection showcasing the beloved characters from the comic strip. The announcement comes on August 7, 2025, to coincide with Snoopy's birthday on August 10.

data.title: Toro sells Trencor brand and auger boring category to American Augers in Bloomington, Minnesota.
data.description: Toro, based in Bloomington, Minnesota, has revealed the sale of the Trencor brand and its Auger Boring category to American Augers. This strategic move signals Toro's focus on streamlining its operations. The sale will see American Augers take over the Trencor brand and all associated assets, enhancing its position in the market. This decision aligns with Toro's goal to optimize its brand portfolio, ensuring efficiency and profitability. The specifics of the deal, including financial details and transition plans, have not been disclosed publicly.

data.title: GFL recapitalizes Green Infrastructure Partners at $4.25B enterprise value with Energy Capital Partners investment.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, GFL Environmental Inc. (NYSE: GFL) (TSX: GFL) disclosed that Green Infrastructure Partners ("GIP") has finalized an agreement with funds managed by Energy Capital Partners, LLC ("ECP"). Through this agreement, GIP will be partnering with ECP on a significant business deal.

data.title: Tractor Supply Co. declares quarterly dividend of $0.23/share for common stock.
data.description: A cash dividend of $0.23 per share of common stock has been declared by Tractor Supply Company's Board of Directors in Brentwood, Tennessee.

data.title: Investors pour $175M into BTCFi VC funding for consumer apps amid growing interest in Bitcoin DeFi for high yields.
data.description: Investors are showing increasing interest in Bitcoin's decentralized finance sector, with a surge in venture capital investments. This trend is fueled by institutional investors turning to Bitcoin due to its growing yield-bearing features.

data.title: H2O Innovation sponsors Canada Ocean team in The Ocean Race Europe 2025 in Kiel, Germany.
data.description: H2O Innovation, a company based in Kiel, Germany, has announced its partnership with The Ocean Race Europe 2025 as the official sponsor of the Canada Ocean | Be Water Positive sailing team. This collaboration showcases H2O Innovation's commitment to promoting sustainable practices in water conservation. The sponsorship deal highlights the company's dedication to supporting environmental initiatives, with a focus on raising awareness about ocean conservation.
